objective: Improve Liga MX full_game accuracy from 50.81% (baseline) without affecting other markets

v1_baseline.description: Original baseline model (pure features, XGB+LGBM+LGBM-Sec two-stage)
v1_baseline.approach: Two-stage (draw vs winner) with baseline features only

v2_cv_tuned.approach: Finer-grid ensemble tuning, multiple seeds, better hyperparams
v2_cv_tuned.notes: Split validation too small, overfitting risk

v3_enhanced.approach: Two-stage + v3 draw-specific features from experimental model
v3_enhanced.notes: 8 temporal folds, stable CV, added features specifically optimized for draws

v4_catboost_xgb.approach: Direct multiclass with CatBoost + XGB, reduced logloss
v4_catboost_xgb.notes: Better logloss but lower accuracy than v3, CatBoost less effective than expected

selected_version.reason: Best accuracy achieved (54.27%), 8 stable CV folds, low variance

impact_on_other_markets.status: NO IMPACT - Models saved to selective directory only
impact_on_other_markets.approach: Only full_game models stored in models_selective/
impact_on_other_markets.validation: Baseline models remain in models/ directory untouched

draw_prediction_challenge.difficulty: Draws are harder to predict than wins/losses (48.5% home wins vs 28.3% away)
draw_prediction_challenge.problem: Imbalanced multiclass problem with minority class (draw) being most unpredictable
possible_solutions: Additional domain features (referee data, injury info, motivation)
Hybrid models (draw likelihood vs strength of win)

feature_performance.effectiveness: Improved accuracy by 3.2% over v2 tuning
feature_performance.note: These features alone improved from 52.12% to 54.27%

immediate: Keep baseline models in models/ for fallback
Use selective plan to apply only to full_game market
short_term: Collect additional draw-related features (player possession, pass accuracy in final third)
Test deep learning approaches (LSTM, GRU for temporal patterns)
Add match context features (tournament stage, rivalry, home/away distribution)
long_term: Ensemble with expert draw models trained separately

deployment_checklist: v3_enhanced model files saved to models_selective/full_game/
Baseline models remain unchanged in models/
Other markets use baseline models (over_25, btts, corners)
No production code changes required, only selective file copy
